subcodes.title: Words to some friends, spoken on 1915-05-06
subcodes.first_line: I am tired with the inactivity of these days. Our precious time has become unprofitable and valueless... The constant presentation of reiteration of worldly talk wears away the sharp edge of the spiritual susceptibilities
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @symbolism, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @autobiographical account; narrative of Abdu'l-Baha, @stories; anecdotes, @call to action
